{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Foundation technique
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Children]] who pass their test of spirit receive a rudimentary [[Foundation technique]] to acclimate them to cycling [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] considered returning to his simpler [[Foundation technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
